title: CAST
subtitle: Surrogate Harm
endpoint: Arrhythmic death or cardiac arrest; total mortality (10 months)

title: Moseley
subtitle: Placebo Surgery
endpoint: Knee pain at 2 years (Knee-Specific Pain Scale)
ci: No significant difference across groups (2-year outcomes)

title: COURAGE
subtitle: PCI vs OMT
endpoint: Death or MI at median 4.6 years

title: ACCORD BP
subtitle: Intensive BP
endpoint: Primary composite (nonfatal MI, nonfatal stroke, CV death) over 4.7 years

title: CHOIR
subtitle: High Hb Target
endpoint: Composite of death, MI, HF hospitalization, or stroke

title: ASCT
subtitle: High-Dose Chemo
trial: International randomized trial of high-dose chemo + ASCT

title: SAVE
subtitle: CPAP for CV Prevention
endpoint: Primary composite CV events over 3.7 years

title: EPaNIC
subtitle: Early Parenteral Nutrition
endpoint: Time to discharge alive from ICU

title: ESCAPE
subtitle: PAC in HF
endpoint: Days alive out of hospital at 6 months
